summary: The implementation adds HoliGreeting, HoliColorAccents components and an isHoliToday() utility, all correctly wired into App.tsx. However, the date-gating utility is hardcoded to March 3, 2026 instead of the required March 14, 2025, meaning the gate is wrong for all three requirements. All other aspects of the implementation (banner with gold text, dismissible overlay, color accents, utility function structure, conditional rendering) appear correct.

missing_requirements.reason: The isHoliToday() utility in frontend/src/lib/dateUtils.ts checks for year 2026 and day 3 (March 3, 2026) instead of year 2025 and day 14 (March 14, 2025). The HoliGreeting component will therefore never show on March 14, 2025.

missing_requirements.requirement: Holi color accents visible only on March 14, 2025
missing_requirements.reason: HoliColorAccents uses the same isHoliToday() which gates to March 3, 2026, not March 14, 2025. Accents will not appear on the required date.

missing_requirements.requirement: isHoliToday() must return true only when the current date is March 14, 2025
missing_requirements.reason: The utility function checks getFullYear() === 2026 && getDate() === 3, which is March 3, 2026 — not March 14, 2025 as specified in all three requirements and the build request.

hallucinated_features.description: Date gate set to March 3, 2026 instead of March 14, 2025; comments in App.tsx and dateUtils.ts also reference March 3, 2026
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly requires the date to be March 14, 2025 for all Holi elements. The implementation introduces a different date (March 3, 2026) that was never requested.
